notes: This manifest is not loaded by the public application yet.
It records current source inventory, future acquisition targets, join requirements, and source-currency planning.
Do not treat planned sources as integrated until generator support, validation, and public caveats are added.

sources.source_concept: Facility-quarter PBJ staffing hours and census/resident-day source
sources.reporting_period_or_snapshot_date: 2024Q4 through 2025Q4 current/context export; 2017Q4 through 2025Q4 PBJ-only history export
sources.integration_purpose: Current staffing dashboard plus PBJ-only historical staffing file for long-range facility, change-over-time, and persistent-pattern views
sources.historical_retention_rule: Retain every quarter as an immutable historical file; add older quarters under source_data/pbj/historical/YYYY/
sources.proposed_future_use: Backfill long-range trends, longer change windows, persistent historical patterns, and affiliation-level longitudinal analysis
sources.next_action: Refresh future PBJ quarters into both current/recent and historical PBJ-only workflows after schema and audit validation.
sources.does_represent: CMS-reported daily staffing hours and census values aggregated by this project into facility-quarter screening metrics
sources.does_not_establish: Regulatory violation, care quality, causation, or real-time staffing
sources.caveats: Missing facility-quarter rows are not zeroes; days with missing or nonpositive census are excluded; positive-census zero-hour days are included as zero-hour days. Historical PBJ export excludes current CMS ratings, QMs, case-mix benchmarks, and affiliation fields as quarter-specific values.

sources.source_concept: Facility metadata, Care Compare ratings, case-mix staffing comparison fields, and selected CMS status fields
sources.integration_purpose: Facility metadata, certified beds, ownership type, case-mix comparison point, and CMS Care Compare rating context
sources.historical_retention_rule: Archive each monthly snapshot before replacing the designated latest file
sources.proposed_future_use: Source freshness display; factual CMS fields such as Special Focus Status, Abuse Icon, provider ownership-change flag, and chain name only after validation and public caveats
sources.next_action: Retain April 2026 as baseline and archive future monthly snapshots; evaluate official status fields as separate factual integrations
sources.does_represent: CMS Provider Information snapshot fields and Care Compare context
sources.does_not_establish: Current conditions for every PBJ quarter, state compliance findings, or LTCOP risk determinations
sources.caveats: Provider Information snapshot timing may not align with each historical PBJ quarter.

sources.source_concept: Facility-level claims-based Care Compare quality measure rows
sources.reporting_period_or_snapshot_date: April 2026 file; measure periods vary by row
sources.integration_purpose: Facility-level contextual claims-based quality measures displayed in the facility dossier
sources.refresh_cadence: monthly or periodic; confirm each official release
sources.historical_retention_rule: Archive each snapshot because measure periods and scores can change by release
sources.proposed_future_use: Potential future selected-measure statewide comparison after workflow design
sources.next_action: Archive future releases and evaluate additional MDS-based QM files before expanding comparison tools
sources.does_represent: Individual CMS quality measure rows and scores imported from the claims-based Quality Measures file
sources.does_not_establish: Staffing performance, regulatory violation, or complete quality-of-care picture
sources.caveats: Interpret with measure definitions, footnotes, and measure period.

sources.source_concept: Facility-level MDS-based Care Compare quality measure rows
sources.refresh_cadence: monthly or periodic; confirm each official release
sources.historical_retention_rule: Archive each snapshot if downloaded
sources.proposed_future_use: Additional facility dossier QM context or selected-measure comparison
sources.next_action: Download after immediate roadmap confirmation and inspect measure volume, footnotes, and display usefulness
sources.does_represent: CMS-published measure-level quality context
sources.does_not_establish: Staffing performance, causation, or standalone care quality conclusions
sources.caveats: Risk of overloading the facility dossier; display should be selective and definition-aware.

sources.source_concept: CMS SNF Enrollment organization and affiliation entity context
sources.integration_purpose: Legal organization, DBA, NPI, proprietary/nonprofit context, organization structure, affiliation entity name, and affiliation entity ID
sources.refresh_cadence: monthly or periodic; confirm each official release
sources.historical_retention_rule: Archive each snapshot to preserve affiliation changes over time
sources.proposed_future_use: Source freshness display and prospective affiliation-change tracking
sources.next_action: Archive future snapshots and document distinction from ownership, management, and chain performance
sources.does_represent: CMS enrollment organization and affiliation entity fields
sources.does_not_establish: Common day-to-day management, legal responsibility, ownership control, or chain membership
sources.caveats: Affiliation entity is a separate CMS concept and must not be collapsed into owner, operator, or chain without validated mapping.

sources.source_concept: CMS-reported facility-level owner and manager relationship rows
sources.refresh_cadence: monthly or periodic; confirm each official release
sources.historical_retention_rule: Archive each national snapshot to preserve multi-state footprint and prospective ownership-change history
sources.proposed_future_use: Facility ownership context, future owner/entity lookup, statewide ownership concentration review, and comparison to staffing screening patterns
sources.next_action: Copy into source_data/ownership only after roadmap approval; inspect entity normalization and owner/manager role definitions before prototype work
sources.does_represent: CMS-reported listed owners, owner/manager roles, ownership percentages where present, association dates, and locations
sources.does_not_establish: Operational control, causation for staffing patterns, legal responsibility for care outcomes, or chain identity
sources.caveats: Ownership, management, affiliation entity, chain performance, and related-party relationships must remain conceptually separate.

sources.does_not_establish: Why ownership changed, operational continuity, or staffing impact

sources.refresh_cadence: monthly or periodic; confirm each official release

sources.official_dataset_name: Payroll-Based Journal Daily Nurse Staffing historical archive
sources.source_concept: PBJ-only public historical staffing export built from official quarterly PBJ files
sources.integration_purpose: Longitudinal PBJ staffing metrics, selected-window change analysis, and persistent-pattern analysis without current contextual CMS snapshot fields
sources.refresh_cadence: quarterly with PBJ releases; confirm each official release
sources.historical_retention_rule: Retain every source quarter and rebuild/audit historical export after adding new quarters
sources.proposed_future_use: Long-range PBJ trend windows and historical staffing exports
sources.next_action: Run production historical audit after every rebuild and keep contextual CMS snapshots separate unless historically aligned snapshots are acquired.
sources.does_represent: Quarter-specific PBJ staffing and resident-day measures derived from official PBJ source files
sources.does_not_establish: Historical CMS ratings, historical QMs, historical affiliation, causation, care quality, or formal compliance findings
sources.caveats: CT comparison public status fields are populated only for full-quarter applicable periods under the conservative methodology.
